title: Better Bed Item 1.21.4 port
description: Port of the original resource pack to the new version of the game
body:
Original resource pack [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-bed-items)

Better Bed Items replaces the inventory models of beds with 2D sprites just like Minecraft had before the World of Color Update. These textures aren't just ripped from older versions are recolored (looking at you Bedrock). These bad boys have been reworked from the ground up to fit in with modern Minecraft textures!
